COMMAND TERMINAL

daniele@dagnelli.net:~$ |

started writing code in southern italy. shipped software at accenture milan, then moved through dublin and london — building systems, breaking them, and eventually leading the teams that do both. started studying machine learning in 2015 — stanford ml in 2016, then deeplearning.ai, udacity nanodegrees, imperial college, reinforcement learning. that thread led to deploying ai at scale: predictive maintenance pipelines across 100+ plants, rag architectures for enterprise data retrieval. started playing with llms in 2021 via openai playground, never stopped. went back to school for an msc in ethical hacking — gchq-certified — because you can't secure what you don't understand.

daniele@dagnelli.net:~$ |
